title: FNaF: RoBlocks
description: A Five Nights at Freddy's Decoration Mod!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c341000140dca6d5b202c18f0b8839a9546a7a7a.png)

> **A Five Nights at Freddy's Mod by PUFF_MON & Call Me Mark**

  
This mod contains all types of FNaF related things such as:
- Blocks
- Decorations
- Items & Tools
- And more...

## Over 200k downloads on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fnaf-roblocks)! Thanks everyone <3

--------

**Common Questions:**

Q: Can you update the mod for X version?

A: No, The mod is only avilable for 1.12.2 (1.18.2 for the remade version).


Q: Can you add X thing to the mod?

A: Sure! Just give us your suggestion on our Discord server so it can enter into the to-do list!


Q: Is this mod avilable for Aternos?

A: It is! Feel free to use this mod with your friends!

-------------------------------------------------------

This mod is now getting remade!! Enter our Discord server or follow the project to know when the update releases!

The updated version will be avilable for Minceraft 1.19.2. You can suggest new stuff on our Discord server aswell!

----------

Find more on our Discord! https://discord.gg/JC4f946hX7

------
You can use this mod in your modpacks.
